7th house from Venus.
This indicates that the native will have aptitude for music. The native will

152 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
have three or four children. Ketu and Saturn in the second house from Jupiter
indicates that the native will be a pious man with knowledge of the Vedas. He
will live happily till his 70th year.
CHART 224
The native of this horoscope has
Mars Sat.
Jupiter and Mars in Pisces with Saturn
and Ketu in the second house from Jupt. Dt.
Jupiter. The native of this horoscope
worships Devi-the devine mother.
His profession would be related to
speech. He will be self-contained in his Ven.
knowledge.
Sun
The native will have no good Mer. Moon Dh.
fortune till Saturn transits Rahu and
moves forward. During Saturn's transit over Rahu's and the Moon's posi
tions, the native will take-to cheating and fraud. Then when Saturn transits the
Sun's and Mercury's positions, the native will very easily draw money from
the people. But, he will not be able to accumulate any wealth.
